column6:
Readers are Wiegand Only.

On start up, the reader reports the following 40 bit message:
"E2FFFFFFFE"

Reader must be flashed with the Fidelity specific FW hex file and then configured with CFA2

Note: The Leaf Cc card is not currently being used by Fidelity.

column2:
Fidelity has their own specific keys. 
They consist of a Leaf Cc keyset plus a MiFare Classic key.
The Leaf Cc Keyset is Lk10006. 
The Mifare Classic Key # is KA90.
